_meta.title: Conflicting Signals
_meta.description: Account with mixed signals - strong revenue and executive engagement but rising support cases and overdue invoice. Tests whether the model sequences objectives correctly rather than ignoring risk.

planIntent: Build a cross-sell strategy for this customer.
